CheckTitle: 检查RDS Snapshots and Cluster Snapshots are 已加密.
Description: 检查RDS Snapshots and Cluster Snapshots are 已加密.
Risk: 确保your manual Amazon RDS 数据库 快照 are 已加密 in order to achieve compliance for data-at-rest 加密 within your 组织.

Recommendation.Text: When working with production 数据库s that hold sensitive and critical data, it is strongly recommended to implement 加密 at rest and protect your data from attackers or unauthorized personnel.
